## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Compatibility update
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Safety or restore improvement
- [ ] Refactor

## Testing

- Claude Desktop version:
- Windows version:
- Provider or model configuration tested:
- Commands or steps run:

## Safety checklist

- [ ] No API keys, tokens, cookies, account data, or private screenshots are included.
- [ ] No proprietary Claude Desktop binaries or copied source files are included.
- [ ] Restore or rollback behavior is preserved.
- [ ] The change is small enough to review.
